title: podman generated remote connections may fail from possible mismatch between "localhost" and 127.0.0.1 listener #16470
body:
### Issue Description

podman generated remote connections may fail from possible mismatch between "localhost" and 127.0.0.1 listener #20616 

Hi Team 

This is issue related above case i'm not sure many people faced same issue but i don't see any proper fix, today i'm also running into this issue including my entire team. 

I'm using windows 11 OS  and few days i have installed podman its was working fine without any issue but when i shutdown the VM and stated again podman and wsl vpn kit both are running here is the output.

```
$ podman system connection list
Name                         URI                                                          Identity                                      Default
podman-machine-default       ssh://user@localhost:58055/run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock  C:\Users\.ssh\podman-machine-default  true
podman-machine-default-root  ssh://root@localhost:58055/run/podman/podman.sock            C:\Users\.ssh\podman-machine-default  false
```

```
$ wsl -l -v
  NAME                                                STATE           VERSION
  wsl-vpnkit                                          Running         2
  podman-machine-default                 Running         2
```

when i pull the image 

```
Error: failed to connect: dial tcp 127.0.0.1:58055: connectex: No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it.

```

Can you some one help me on this ?

I don't find this path in my machine -  Can you manually change the ssh host url in ~/.config/containers/containers.conf from localhost to 127.0.0.1 to see if this changes anything.

comments.body: Did you try to stop and start the machine again via the podman machine commands?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Closing due to inactivity and unanswered question - feel free to open if you have a reproducer.
